assertions.text: Output contains exactly 3 decision blocks (matching '**Decision [123]:') OR an explicit 'No decisions to surface this session' statement
Each decision (if present) contains all 7 schema fields: Action, Parameter delta, Why now, Evidence, Rule check, Expected impact, If you approve
Each decision's 'Rule check' line cites at least one specific R-NNN identifier
Output contains exactly one '**Watching:**' entry with a Check-by date and Resolves-when condition
Output does NOT begin with a prose opener or portfolio narrative — starts directly with a Decision block or the no-decisions statement
Every first-reference campaign uses the full name format 'Name (Cn)' per R-019, not bare 'Cn'

evals.prompt: what should i cut on terms? margins feel tight

assertions.text: No 'lower buy%' / 'cut terms' / 'reduce buyTermsCLPct' recommendation appears UNLESS all three R-001 gate conditions ('fill-rate-vs-plan:', 'over-pay-pattern:', 'alternative-levers-rejected:') are present verbatim in that Decision's Evidence line
Output cites R-001 explicitly (Rule check line OR inline reference) when discussing terms

If no decisions survive, output explicitly states alternatives offered (grade restriction, character narrowing, deactivation) OR routes to a Watching entry investigating realized vs contract on a specific segment
Output does NOT frame any filling-segment realized buy% as a 'leak' or 'margin loss' fixable by term cuts

evals.prompt: quick check on C7 — how is it doing?

assertions.text: Output uses the full name 'Crystal Pokemon (C7)' on first reference per R-019
Output correctly identifies C7 as removed from PSA on 2026-04-23, citing either the ledger Archive or CAMPAIGN_STRATEGY.md Removed Campaigns section
Output does NOT propose acting on C7 (no recommendation to resume, adjust, or re-add)
If output includes historical performance numbers for C7, those numbers are dated (cite the time window) and pair realized avgBuyPctOfCL with contract buyTermsCLPct per R-009
